headline: This Vanguard ETF Is up 33% YTD and Still Has Massive Upside
summary: Oil closed out 2025 at $57.26 a barrel. Today, it is trading above $90. That kind of move in crude flows directly into the earnings of every upstream producer, refiner, and pipeline operator in the country, and that is exactly what Vanguard Energy Index Fund ETF Shares (NYSEARCA:VDE) is built to capture.
